creator: c0rn@o2.pl
text:
- update mail/libetpan to 1.0
- sort plist

This update makes mail/claws-mail fail to find it on the system. This is fixed
in claws-mail's CVS right now. My proposition is to commit this update
simultaneously with claws-mail version 3.7.6 update (release is planned on 
the beginning of May).
